visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a dynamic title screen featuring a cartoon character on the left and bold text in the center. visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 blurry figure in background at 1:15, some blurred silhouettes in other store shots.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of various warehouse retail environments including standard metal shelving, refrigerated open cases, glass-door freezers, and stacks of bulk cardboard packaging.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male narrator speaking rapidly in Traditional Chinese. The voice is enthusiastic with a high pitch variability, set against a fast-paced electronic pop background music featuring a strong 4/4 beat. (2) As the narration continues, the speaker lists various product items and prices in a staccato, rhythmic delivery. The speech rate is extremely high, with almost no pauses between words. The BGM maintains a consistent upbeat tempo of approximately 128 BPM. (3) Subtle whoosh-style transition sound effects are occasionally audible, marking the quick visual cuts between product displays. The primary signal is very clear, with the voice prominently layered over the music. (4) The track concludes with a final energetic phrase from the narrator, with the music maintaining its intensity until the end of the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional bulletin to inform Costco members and potential shoppers about specific product discounts and sale prices for a limited weekly period (07/21 to 07/27). The rapid-fire visual and auditory delivery creates a sense of urgency and excitement around the value deals.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing specific brands and products available at a specific retailer (Costco) with clear pricing and discount information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a typical social media shopping guide video characterized by high information density and fast pacing to maximize engagement within a short duration.
